content_json: [{"key":"0.625220022671273726","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture1/323ff729-dcff-452e-afe7-937f825235d1.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture2/5b706405-4aa3-4ac5-8401-5e2133204708.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.a83605e58f5d08","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维克托"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者维克托，身份编码E19-110163，Re-A芯片正常。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"作为数据矿工，异格者维克托没有固定的居所，E.O.S.档案馆单也没有香到与他相关的任何记录。根据坊间传闻维克托是被一个叫「老爹」的数据矿工在数据空间中发现的怪家伙，真是不可思议：不过，这家伙的智力水平只相当于一个8岁的人类儿童。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维克多随身背着的工具箱里存放着一些强大而邪恶的意识体，它们无时无刻不在试图侵染维克托的思想。但好在维克托似乎难以理解这些意识体的话语，常常以一种举拙的方式进行战斗。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"破序"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/157597/2024/3/26/522073.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto", ShowIcon":false,"isShowLabel":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":false,"isShowTable":false,"isShowSkill":true,"title":"必杀/终结技","icon":"","label":"","name":"","desc":"","tableList":[{"key":"0.49157fa56beb","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能升级所需材料"}]}]},"colStyle":[{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"}],"head":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能1","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能4","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能5","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能6","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"4","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能7","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"5","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]}],"body":[[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":" ,{"text":"+8","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：【护盾】转化百分比增加至"},{"text":"110%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"aDY9eZHdvCW5uf3P","type":"upgrade-info","data":{"title":"潜能","isShowTabs":false,"tabs":[],"upgradeList":[{"key":"0.685c02bd78f9","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/382722.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.901c446764fac8","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/389425.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/960068.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【数据矿工的新朋友。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"城市的下水道总是这么肮脏。这里堆满了伊瑟世界里生产出来的各种数据垃圾，稍有不慎就会被污染侵蚀，通常来说，没有人会在这里久留。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但维克托是个例外。他是一名数据矿工，工作内容就是在城市的边缘挖掘数据空间，搭建通信道路，拓宽区块范围。对他来说，下水道基本就是他的家。由于相貌怪异，维克托总是戴着面具，穿着厚重的防护服。跟他作伴的，只有从出生时就陪着维克托的老爹。很长一段时间里，维克多一直认为，这世界上只有他们两个人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"今天是工作日，维克托摆弄着背后的工具箱，熟练地清扫着岸上的数据污染。维克托突然注意到，他的身旁站着一个陌生的家伙。老实憨厚的维克托很快把他当做了自己的新朋友。自此以后，维克托每天都会跟这位新朋友一起发呆，聊天。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维克托异常的行为引起了老爹的注意，在调查之下，老爹惊讶地发现，维克托的这位新朋友竟然是已故异格者们残留意识的集合体。虽然不知道这个意识体为什么会缠着维克托，但它对维克托并没有恶意。得出这个结论后，老爹悬着的心终于放了下来。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【大块头的小梦想。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维克托一直渴望拥有一台属于自己的挖矿机，但作为矿工工会的新成员，他并没有这个资格，只能给老矿工打打下手。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这天，老爹贼眉鼠眼地找到正在发呆的维克托，说是给他找了一台很适合他的挖矿机。维克托喜出望外，跟着老爹一路来到数据空间的边缘地带，找到了那台巨大的挖矿机。但维克托很快发现，这台机器似乎抛锚了，他站在车头，望着这台庞大而复杂的造物不知所措。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「维——克——托！使——劲——拉！」不知道为什么。刚才还在身旁的老爹竟然跑到了百米开外，正以一种极其夸张的姿势做着向后拉的动作，指挥维克托抢修这台机器。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「啊哦，好的老爹！」维克托深吸一口气，抱起挖矿机巨大的液压杆，猛地向后拉起。挖矿机发出吱吱呀呀的响声，似乎已经不堪重负。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「换个方向——继续拉——」终于，在经历了数十分钟的抢修后，这台价值几百万点数的挖掘机器彻底宣布报废。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"老爹生意上的竞争对手，又少了一个。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【E-07的人气王】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"下水道里罕见地挤满了人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维克托和老爹不正当的竞争行为触怒了那片区域的开发商，他们围住了老爹的小屋，向二人索要相应的赔偿。老爹「要钱没有，要命一条」的态度成功激起了对方的愤怒，暴，li，事，件，一触即发。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凭借着多年争抢地盘打下的身体基础，老爹在这些打手面前坚持了一段时间，但终究双拳难敌四手，被打手们逼到了角落；维克依靠着他壮硕的身体，挥舞着自己的工具箱在人群中很冲直撞，但最后却因为过于拙劣的战斗技巧，被强行掀翻在地，这场械斗以一种毫无意外的结果告终。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"看着十几个人才能勉强制服的维克托，开发商想到了一个新主意。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"几天之后，美梦俱乐部迎来了本年度的人气王—一卖艺赎父的憨厚矿工维克托。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，爆伤，爆伤/攻击加成
